sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὀψάριον

- Transliteration: Opsarion

- Phonetic: op-sar'-ee-on

- Definition:

1. fish

- Origin: from a presumed derivative of the base of G3702

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Neuter of a presumed derivative of the base of G3702; a relish to other food (as if cooked sauce) that is (specifically) fish (presumably salted and dried as a condiment): - fish.
